The Stewards
From The Stewards
To All Teams, All Officials
Document 51
Date 06 June 2026

Title Infringement - Free Practice 3 Deleted Lap Times

Garry Connelly Tanja Geilhausen

2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 
05 – 07 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 51 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  06 June 2026 
 
        Time  14:10 
  
 
The Stewards, having received a report from the Race Director, have considered the following matter and determine the 
following: 
 
Session Free Practice 3 
  
Fact The F1 cars below did not use the track at turns 1, 10 and 16.
